---
name: "🚀 Feature Request"
about: Suggest a new API endpoint, database schema, or background worker capability for VokeyFitness AI
title: "feat: [Short Description of Proposal]"
labels: ["enhancement", "feature"]
assignees: []
---

### 💡 User Story
As an API consumer or developer, I want to [action/behavior] so that [benefit/outcomes].

### 📝 Feature Description
A clear and concise description of what the new API endpoint or backend behavior should do.

### 🗄️ Database & Schema Proposal
Describe new Mongoose schemas, text indices, pre-save triggers, or TTL indexes required.

### ❓ Alternative Solutions Considered
A clear and concise description of any alternative designs (e.g., standard Express caching vs Redis caching).

### 📝 Additional Context
Add any other context or details about the feature request here.
